text:
Created attachment 254866
devel/py-inquirer.patch

py-inquirer package provides a collection of interactive command line user
interfaces, inspired by Inquirer.js. It simplifies the process of asking
questions, validating answers, and managing hierarchical prompts, making it
easy to create engaging command line applications.

WWW:    https://github.com/magmax/python-inquirer

Thanks in advance.
